title: LSASS Credential Dumping (Mimikatz)
description: Detects LSASS memory access (Sysmon EventID 10) consistent with Mimikatz-style credential dumping.
author: SOC Team
aql: SELECT sourceip, username, QIDNAME(qid) AS EventName FROM events WHERE UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%AgentLogFile=%Sysmon%' AND UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=10%' AND UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%lsass.exe%' ORDER BY starttime DESC LAST 10 MINUTES
